mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( user_id, username, operation, method, request_url, request_params, response_result, ip, status, error_msg, operation_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{username}, #{operation}, #{method}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParams}, #{responseResult}, #{ip}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{operationTime}, #{username}, NOW(), #{username}, NOW(), 0 )
